sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8555" key="a)neurusmatw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνευρ-υσματώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n8555.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like an aneurism,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.10</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:6:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
